stemHtml:
What should be considered when using the following NOTAM information from the transmitter during the validity period?

Q EDGG/QNVXX/IV/BO/AE/000/999/5116N00645E025 A EDDL B FROM: 14/07/11 15:02 C TO: PERM E DUSSELDORF VOR/DME DUS, 115.5 MHZ/CH 98Y, VOR PART MAY ONLY BE USED FOR THE RADIALS IN THE PUBLISHED EN ROUTE, APPROACH AND DEPARTURE PROCEDURES

options.a: Use of the transmitter to fix the aircraft position outside of the published procedures is prohibited.
options.b: The distance indications should only be used together with the published radials.
options.c: Radials that are excluded from the published approaches should only be used with the associated DME ranges.
options.d: Only the radials are usable when following the published approaches.
